mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT USER_GRP_ID AS userGrpId, USER_GRP_NM AS userGrpNm FROM mhdb.TB_USER_GROUP WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY USER_GRP_ID

SELECT MENU_ID AS menuId, MENU_NM AS menuNm, MENU_URL AS menuUrl, MENU_ORDER AS menuOrder FROM mhdb.TB_MENU WHERE MENU_ID NOT IN ( SELECT MENU_ID FROM mhdb.TB_USER_AUTH WHERE USER_GB = #{userGb}::integer ) ORDER BY MENU_ORDER

SELECT DISTINCT M.MENU_ID AS menuId, lpad(M.MENU_CD,5,'0') AS menuCd, M.MENU_NM AS menuNm, M.MENU_URL AS menuUrl, M.MENU_ORDER AS menuOrder FROM mhdb.TB_MENU M, mhdb.TB_USER_AUTH A, mhdb.TB_USER_GROUP I WHERE A.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID AND A.USER_GB = #{userGb}::integer ORDER BY M.MENU_ORDER
